description: The drive itself as a [lat, lon] polyline for the route-overview map, one per town pair (key '{slugA}|{slugB}', slugs sorted), resampled from OSRM's driving geometry to ~0.3 mi spacing. This is the whole drive - side roads and untracked highways included - so the map draws an unbroken line, unlike the crash-scoped route polylines. Built alongside route-journeys.json.
